debug_info.goal:
ax1 : ∀ (x : Inhab), Peculiar x ↔ (Sane x ↔ ¬Doctor x)
ax2 : ∀ (x : Inhab), Special x ↔ ∀ (y : Inhab), ¬Doctor y ↔ (Sane y ↔ Peculiar x)
ax3 : ∀ (x y : Inhab), (Sane x ↔ Special y) → (Sane (bf x) ↔ ¬Doctor y)
ax4 : Sane Tarr ↔ (x : Inhab) → Doctor x → Sane x
ax5 : Sane Fether ↔ ∀ (x : Inhab), ¬Doctor x → ¬Sane x
ax6 : Sane Fether ↔ Sane Tarr
⊢ False

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  classical
  by_cases hT : Sane Tarr
  ·
    have hF : Sane Fether := (ax6).2 hT
    have hdoc : ∀ x, Doctor x → Sane x := (ax4).1 hT
    have hnondoc : ∀ x, ¬ Doctor x → ¬ Sane x := (ax5).1 hF
    have hSD : ∀ x, Sane x ↔ Doctor x := by
      intro x
      constructor
      · intro hs
        by_contra hd
        exact (hnondoc x hd) hs
      · intro hd
        exact hdoc x hd
    have hNotPec : ∀ x, ¬ Peculiar x := by
      intro x hx
      have hx' : Sane x ↔ ¬ Doctor x := (ax1 x).1 hx
      have hDnot : Doctor x ↔ ¬ Doctor x := by
        constructor
        · intro hd
          have hs : Sane x := (hSD x).2 hd
          exact hx'.1 hs
        · intro hnd
          have hs : Sane x := hx'.2 hnd
          exact (hSD x).1 hs
      have hd : Doctor x := by
        by_cases hd : Doctor x
        · exact hd
        · exact hDnot.2 hd
      exact (hDnot.1 hd) hd
    have hSpecial : ∀ x, Special x := by
      intro x
      apply (ax2 x).2
      intro y
      have hnd : ¬Doctor y ↔ ¬Sane y := (not_congr (hSD y)).symm
      have hx : ¬ Peculiar x := hNotPec x
      simpa [hx] using hnd
    have hPrem : Sane Tarr ↔ Special (bf Tarr) :=
      ⟨(fun _ => hSpecial (bf Tarr)), (fun _ => hT)⟩
    have hbf : Sane (bf Tarr) ↔ ¬ Doctor (bf Tarr) := (ax3 Tarr (bf Tarr)) hPrem
    have hns : ¬ Sane (bf Tarr) :=
